case_title: GOMEZ, FRANCISCO VS ESCOBAR, CARLOS DBA CARLOS AUTO ELECTRIC

docket_entries.description: SIGNED ORDER TO STAY WRIT OF EXECUTION FORWARDED TO SHERIFF'S DEPT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY GOMEZ, FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT ESCOBAR, CARLOS DBA CARLOS AUTO ELECTRIC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-11-2006 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY ON AUG. 31, 2007 AS TP DEFT ESCOBAR, CARLOS RETURNED UNSATISFIED.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ESCOBAR, CARLOS DBA CARLOS AUTO ELECTRIC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOMEZ, FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESCOBAR, CARLOS DBA CARLOS AUTO ELECTRIC $450.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $450.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ESCOBAR, CARLOS DBA CARLOS AUTO ELECTRIC
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT ESCOBAR, CARLOS DBA CARLOS AUTO ELECTRIC HEARING SET FOR OCT-31-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STAY OF EXECUTION ON WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ESCOBAR, CARLOS DBA CARLOS AUTO ELECTRIC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOMEZ, FRANCISCO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ESCOBAR, CARLOS DBA CARLOS AUTO ELECTRIC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF OCT-31-2006, GRANTED
